---
description: "Use when verifying Caracal policy behavior, policy inputs, platform decision contract, OPA syntax, policy versions, policy sets, simulation, or activation against documentation."
---
# Documentation Validation

- Check Caracal documentation first.
- Check Caracal policy schemas when field shape matters.
- Check OPA/Rego documentation when syntax or language behavior matters.
- Use documentation MCPs such as Context7 or connected internal documentation MCPs when available.
- Compare documentation with existing policies only after official docs.
- Call out unsupported or undocumented requests explicitly instead of inferring support.
- List verified facts, conflicts, unknowns, and safer next steps.

Documentation overrides assumptions and memory.
